summary: Completed comprehensive UI consistency testing of Rooms page against Dashboard design. Successfully verified that the Rooms page now uses the same wide dashboard-like layout, hero structure, and design language while maintaining all existing functionality.
passed_tests: Rooms page uses same wide container/padding as Dashboard (48px left/right)
Header structure matches Dashboard with identical branding and navigation
Hero section follows Dashboard pattern: left title/description, right profile card
Quick actions (Oda Bul, Oda Oluştur, Odaya Katıl) properly positioned in hero horizontally
Forms section maintains functionality with improved rounded-2xl styling
Tab switching between Create/Join forms works correctly
Form inputs accept data and validation works
Profile card displays user info correctly with avatar
Theme toggle functions properly in both light/dark modes
Quick action buttons properly switch tabs and scroll to forms
All interactive elements are clickable and responsive
Design language matches Dashboard: colors, shadows, spacing, typography
No console errors or UI regressions detected
